<> to replace one url with another within a string in php you can use the str_replace function which works for repeating strings as well here is the code ```php $string = 'new post on the site http://stackoverflow.com/xyz1

'; $old_url = 'http://stackoverflow.com/xyz1'; $new_url = 'http://yahoo.com/abc1'; $replaced_string = str_replace($old_url, $new_url, $string); echo $replaced_string; ``` this will replace all occurrences of the old url with the new url in the string a palindrome is a word phrase or sequence that reads the same backward as forward like radar or level the palindrome in this response is level
